hero.title: Sergio Alejandro Morales

skills.title: Tech Stack

skills.n8n: Open-source workflow automation to connect APIs and services.
skills.tailwind: Utility-first CSS framework for building modern responsive interfaces.
skills.nativewind: Tailwind implementation for React Native, utility styles in mobile apps.
skills.zustand: Simple and minimalist state management for React and React Native.
skills.nestjs: Progressive Node.js framework for building scalable backend applications.
skills.dotnet: Microsoft platform for enterprise application and backend development.
skills.deploy: Publishing and deployment of apps to App Store and Play Store.
